programme.title: History's Greatest Picks With Mike Wolfe
programme.desc: From the sports arena to the circus ring and even to the silver screen, this episode dishes on the scene-stealing big-budget items connected to some of the greatest performers of all time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Picks With Mike Wolfe
programme.desc: From junkyard jalopies to long-lost classics, explore the rare wheels and automobilia lost to time that yield some good deals.

programme.title: History's Greatest Picks With Mike Wolfe
programme.desc: Whether unearthed in woodsheds, abandoned places and even the local dump, these discarded and forgotten backyard discoveries lead to jaw-dropping jackpots.

programme.title: History's Greatest Picks With Mike Wolfe
programme.desc: Unveiling notorious artifacts from crime history that made a killing on the auction block.

programme.title: History's Greatest Picks With Mike Wolfe
programme.desc: From the sports arena to the circus ring and even to the silver screen, this episode dishes on the scene-stealing big-budget items connected to some of the greatest performers of all time.

programme.title: Coveted Rare Gold
programme.desc: Secure a now coveted 2024 High Relief 1oz Gold Liberty & Britannia in Proof 70 condition for your collection. This is the first coin to display Lady Liberty & Britannia together and is the rarest coin of the series with only 10,000 struck.

programme.title: Coveted Rare Gold
programme.desc: Secure a now coveted 2024 High Relief 1oz Gold Liberty & Britannia in Proof 70 condition for your collection. This is the first coin to display Lady Liberty & Britannia together and is the rarest coin of the series with only 10,000 struck.

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: Add a 10-Coin or 20-Coin Roll of the iconic Peace Silver Dollars from 1922-1925 in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection. Honoring the peace achieved after WWI, these Classic American Silver coins boast historical significance.

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: Add a 10-Coin or 20-Coin Roll of the iconic Peace Silver Dollars from 1922-1925 in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection. Honoring the peace achieved after WWI, these Classic American Silver coins boast historical significance.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Unidentified objects, witnessed by military pilots; extraterrestrial probes, flying through the solar system; a potential alien home world that may be hidden in the darkness of space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: From massive asteroids and deadly bursts of radiation to microscopic alien viruses, each one of these cosmic dangers may end human civilization as we know it. Can we prepare for the inevitable calamity that may be coming our way? Or are we doomed to oblivion?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: As humanity makes plans to travel beyond the Moon to new worlds, it is necessary to assess how humans are preparing to become extraterrestrials; analyzing how humanity will survive this trip into the unknown.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Humanity has worshiped the Sun since the beginning of time, and yet even with modern technology, so little is known about it; analyzing if unlocking the mysteries of the Sun can be the difference between life and death for human civilization.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Humans want to go into uncharted territories to make discoveries; as the next era of space exploration begins it must be analyzed what humans will find when reaching other planets, as well as the dangers faced when trying to conquer new frontiers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: For centuries, we've been fascinated by our nearest planetary neighbor, Venus, and its shimmering appearance in our night sky. But this glowing yellow orb that's about the same size as our world is covered in massive volcanoes, poisonous clouds of acid rain, and a surface temperature hot enough to melt lead. Is Venus our evil twin--or a warning about what Earth will become in the future?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Earth's moon is only one of hundreds in the solar system, each of them a mysterious and often bizarre world; analyzing if alien moons offer a key to explore outer space and even finding a new home for humanity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: The blue marble called Earth remains in large part a mystery to the 8 billion people who live on it; analyzing how Earth came to exist, and the secrets of its survival; discussing how long humans will be able to call it "home.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a mythical monster that turns out to be real, to a deadly prehistoric animal, and a frozen tundra hiding a pandora's box full of lethal pathogens, these startling discoveries shock and terrify the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From World War II bombs pulled from the sea and Nazi bunkers buried in sand, to chemical weapons hidden beneath Washington, D.C., and a supernova caught on camera - these explosive discoveries prove that history's blasts from the past can still shake our world today.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Riddles don't just live in books, they're all around us. From a hollow nickel hiding Cold War secrets, to an ancient chess piece that reappears after centuries, and even a mysterious underwater circle carved by an unlikely artist...these puzzling finds remind us that history likes to keep us guessing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most valuable treasures found in the most unlikely of ways, like a priceless Ancient Roman mosaic hiding in a New York City apartment, or the most valuable piece of Americana tucked away in a $4 flea market find.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: A species thought lost forever is spotted again; a dog plays an unexpected role in recovering the World Cup trophy; a puppy from the Ice Age emerges intact after 18,000 years; revealing just how unpredictable the natural world can be.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: History's biggest discoveries aren't always its best. A diamond heist that unravels in a ditch, a colossal burning crater dubbed the "Gateway to Hell," and an island dominated by venomous vipers prove that when finds go big, they can also go very bad.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a hidden cache of bones, to an ancient tomb shrouded in mystery and even a rare sports car dug up in a backyard; these eerie revelations prove that some secrets refuse to stay buried.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition
programme.desc: From one of the most iconic UFO photos ever taken to a mass sighting that stunned hundreds, the classic disc shape has fueled debate for decades. Tony Harris and his team reexamine the most compelling cases-and deliver their verdict.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Beneath the earth, frozen in the tundra, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time; from an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths, and even a killer virus thawed from the ice, these shocking finds reveal the dark side of discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a hidden cache of bones, to an ancient tomb shrouded in mystery and even a rare sports car dug up in a backyard; these eerie revelations prove that some secrets refuse to stay buried.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: History's biggest discoveries aren't always its best. A diamond heist that unravels in a ditch, a colossal burning crater dubbed the "Gateway to Hell," and an island dominated by venomous vipers prove that when finds go big, they can also go very bad.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition

programme.title: 1899 Historic Gold
programme.desc: Own the remarkable 1899 Philadelphia Liberty Head Gold Double Eagle struck over a century ago and graded in Mint State 62 condition. That is the same museum quality grade as the MS62 example held in the illustrious Smithsonian Institution!

programme.title: 1899 Historic Gold
programme.desc: Own the remarkable 1899 Philadelphia Liberty Head Gold Double Eagle struck over a century ago and graded in Mint State 62 condition. That is the same museum quality grade as the MS62 example held in the illustrious Smithsonian Institution!

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today; with only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today; with only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: An exploration of the top 10 mysterious sites on the planet that could prove alien visitation; from the age of the dinosaurs and ancient Egypt.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In 1980, three young military men are sent into a UK forest to investigate strange lights, and they reportedly find a spacecraft, then they are ordered to never speak of the incident again; UFO encounters kept under wraps and what they reveal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Exploring why ancient civilizations believed mountains were the homes of gods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: According to legend, a curse was placed on the tomb of King Tutankhamun; researchers theorize that the curse came about as the result of alien technology with the purpose of protecting the truth about an otherworldly event as well as an alien device.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient site of Gobekli Tepe challenges what archaeologists believe about the past; the megalithic stone complex was built over 12,000 years ago, 5,000 years before the first known civilization was said to have emerged in Mesopotamia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Since 2017, the Navy has been releasing photos and videos of unidentified aerial phenomena, and ancient astronaut theorists suggest the images are nearly identical to accounts from centuries ago.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind
programme.desc: The possibility of direct human contact with extraterrestrial life within the highest levels of the U.S. government.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Enormous, megalithic structures of mysterious origins; a vast underground complex containing the remains of what some believe to be otherworldly beings; the ancient mysteries that exist on the islands of Malta could be connected to alien visitation.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Aliens from the tiny star Sirius B may have visited humans in the distant past, imparting the knowledge of civilization to peoples thousands of miles apart.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From stone-throwing jungle apes, to swarms of sinister clowns stalking the suburbs, to skies raining down murderous birds, these are the strange encounters that leave the experts scratching their heads.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Monkey glands for immortality, hypnotized assassins and a brain-linked cyborg couple; investigating some of the strangest experiments on record.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Looking at outlandish inventions; a full-body gas mask for babies; Smell-o-Vision; a robot powered by eating slugs; inflatable airplanes; hidden cameras in contact lenses; coffin security systems.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: History is full of people pushing the limits, but some are more astonishing than others; like the man who single-handedly liberated a town during World War II; or an epic robbery in Buenos Aires that was pulled off with zero casualties.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: How did a pet pig spring into action to save its owner's life? Which mysterious spirits became the unlikely heroes that turned the tide for a doomed flight? And what shocking move did a carjacker make to rescue a baby trapped in a scorching car? These are the wild, unexpected stories of heroes you'd never see coming.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Uncover the wild beginnings behind ordinary objects, legendary figures, and even the sayings we use every day. Why did Abraham Lincoln once step into the wrestling ring? How do million-dollar birds procreate? What's the story behind a dog that ignited an international conflict? These are the strangest origin tales you've never heard-and won't believe!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Chattanooga UFO, Ark of the Covenant, and Vanishing Time Mystery
programme.desc: Did a backyard stargazer capture video of UFOs over Chattanooga, Tennessee? Has the biblical Ark of the Covenant been discovered in a cave? Could a cathedral in Germany be the key to 300 years of history vanishing? And what's behind the mysterious phenomenon known as earthquake lights? Tony Harris and his team of experts analyze the video evidence to find the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: A drilling accident tears open the Earth and unleashes a fire pit known as the "Gates of Hell"; a routine flight turns harrowing when the pilot gets sucked out of the cockpit midair; a ship mishap sinks 4,000 luxury cars into the Atlantic.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
